zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri Pieters於大約1595年出生在荷蘭藍德時，他的父親Hans Pieter de Brier21歲，母親Sara Colle21歲。他於1624年與Elisabeth Gilde在荷蘭結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1649年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri Pieters于大约1595年出生在荷兰藍德时，他的父亲Hans Pieter de Brier21岁，母亲Sara Colle21岁。他于1624年与Elisabeth Gilde在荷兰结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1649年在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pieters
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Raymonde, Laurent, Marcel, Pierre, Serge.  Dutch Bernardus, Wim, Bram, Pieter, Willem.
Dutch and Flemish: patronymic from the personal name Pieter (see Peter ). This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Fritz, Heinz, Helmut, Horst, Kaspar, Klaus, Siegfried, Wolfgang.

English, Scottish, German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), Czech (Moravian), Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Péter): from the personal name Peter (Greek Petros, from petra ‘rock’). The personal name was popular throughout Christian Europe in the Middle Ages, having been bestowed by Christ as a byname on the apostle Simon bar Jonah, the brother of Andrew. The name was chosen by Christ for its symbolic significance (John 1:42, Matt. 16:18); Saint Peter is regarded as the founding head of the Christian Church in view of Christ's saying, ‘Thou art Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church’. In Christian Germany in the early Middle Ages this was the most frequent personal name of non-ancient Germanic origin until the 14th century. In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Czech Petr , Polish Piotr and Pietr, Albanian Pjetri (from the personal name Pjetër, definite form Pjetri), and also their derivatives (see examples at Peterson ). It has also been adopted as a surname by Ashkenazic Jews.

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.description: Britain waged wars against the Dutch.
"The United East India Company (V.O.C.), destined to become a powerful force in Holland's ""Golden Age""of discovery, exploration, and trade, is founded."
The Dutch ousted the Portuguese from Indonesia, but the Portuguese retained the eastern half of Timor.
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri Pieters was born about 1595, in Zeeland, Netherlands, his father, Hans Pieter de Brier, was 21 and his mother, Sara Colle, was 21. He married Elisabeth Gilde in 1624, in Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died about 1649, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri Pieters est né environ 1595, à Zélande, Pays-Bas, son père, Hans Pieter de Brier, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Sara Colle, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth Gilde en 1624, à Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1649, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri Pieters um 1595 in Seeland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hans Pieter de Brier 21 und seine Mutter Sara Colle 21. it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri Pieters è nato il circa 1595 nel Zelanda, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Hans Pieter de Brier, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Sara Colle, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth Gilde nel 1624, nel Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì circa 1649, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Henri Pieters(이)가 대략 1595년 네덜란드 제랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hans Pieter de Brier(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Sara Colle(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1624년 네덜란드에서 Elisabeth Gilde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1649년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri Pieters родился около 1595 г. в местности зиланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Hans Pieter de Brier было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Sara Colle, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Gilde в 1624 г. в местности Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер около 1649 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.
